title: Imposition of tax
doc_html:
PART II.  TAX ON SALES AT PUBLIC AUCTION

§2651.  Imposition of tax

There shall be a tax levied upon all sales of property at public auction to be imposed and collected as provided in Title 5.
doc_text:
PART II.  TAX ON SALES AT PUBLIC AUCTION
§2651.  Imposition of tax
There shall be a tax levied upon all sales of property at public auction to be imposed and collected as provided in Title 5.
